name: Minimum habitable room area
description: Every habitable room shall have a floor area of not less than 9.5 sqm.
embedding_text: minimum habitable room area 9.5 square metres India national building code 2016

name: Minimum kitchen area
description: Kitchen shall have a minimum floor area of 5.0 sqm.
embedding_text: minimum kitchen area 5 square metres India building code

name: Minimum bathroom area
description: Each bathroom shall have a minimum floor area of 1.8 sqm.
embedding_text: minimum bathroom toilet area 1.8 square metres India building code NBC 2016

name: Minimum habitable room width
description: No habitable room shall have a width less than 2.4 m.
embedding_text: minimum room width 2.4 metres India national building code habitable room

name: Minimum kitchen width
description: Kitchen shall have a minimum width of 1.8 m.
embedding_text: minimum kitchen width 1.8 metres India NBC 2016

name: Minimum ceiling height — habitable rooms
description: All habitable rooms shall have a minimum ceiling height of 2.75 m.
embedding_text: minimum ceiling height habitable room 2.75 metres India NBC 2016

name: Minimum ceiling height — bathrooms
description: Bathrooms and toilets shall have a minimum ceiling height of 2.1 m.
embedding_text: minimum ceiling height bathroom toilet 2.1 metres India NBC 2016

name: Maximum FAR — residential zone R1
description: In residential zone R1 (low-density), the maximum Floor Area Ratio (FSI) is 1.0.
embedding_text: maximum floor area ratio FAR FSI R1 residential zone 1.0 Mumbai Maharashtra DCPR

name: Maximum FAR — residential zone R2
description: In residential zone R2 (medium-density), the maximum Floor Area Ratio (FSI) is 1.5 (base) with potential TDR up to 2.5.
embedding_text: maximum floor area ratio FAR FSI R2 residential zone 1.5 Mumbai Maharashtra DCPR TDR

name: Maximum ground coverage — residential
description: For residential buildings, the maximum ground coverage is 50% of the plot area.
embedding_text: maximum ground coverage 50 percent residential building India NBC 2016 DCPR

name: Front setback — road <9m (Mumbai DCPR)
description: For plots facing a road less than 9m wide, the minimum front setback is 3.0 m.
embedding_text: front setback 3 metres road width less than 9 metres Mumbai DCPR 2034

name: Front setback — road 9–18m (Mumbai DCPR)
description: For plots facing a road 9–18m wide, the minimum front setback is 4.5 m.
embedding_text: front setback 4.5 metres road width 9 to 18 metres Mumbai DCPR 2034

name: Minimum window area — habitable rooms
description: Every habitable room shall have windows with a total area not less than 1/10th of the floor area, with at least half of the window area openable.
embedding_text: minimum window area 10 percent floor area habitable room light ventilation India NBC 2016

name: Minimum staircase width — residential
description: Internal staircases in residential buildings shall have a minimum clear width of 1.0 m.
embedding_text: minimum staircase width 1 metre residential building India NBC 2016

name: Maximum stair riser height — residential
description: Riser height for internal stairs shall not exceed 190 mm.
embedding_text: maximum stair riser height 190 millimetres residential India NBC 2016

name: Minimum stair tread depth — residential
description: Tread depth for internal stairs shall not be less than 250 mm.
embedding_text: minimum stair tread depth 250 millimetres residential India NBC 2016
